---
title: "About"
description-meta: "Biography, research interests, education, appointments, awards and professional activities of Sivalingam S M."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.academic-about}

::: {.about-header}

<div class="about-label"> </div>

<p class="about-summary">
I am an <strong>Assistant Professor of Mathematics</strong> at the
<strong>National Institute of Technology Warangal</strong>. My research
lies at the intersection of <strong>Scientific Machine Learning</strong>,
<strong>Dynamical Systems</strong>, and <strong>Control Theory</strong>.

I develop mathematically rigorous learning and computational methods for problems arising in **differential equations, dynamical systems, scientific computing, and control**.

My research combines **mathematical analysis, numerical methods, optimization, and machine learning**. A central theme of my work is the integration of modern artificial intelligence with classical mathematical theory to develop reliable, interpretable, and theoretically grounded computational methods.

Prior to joining NIT Warangal, I was a **Postdoctoral Fellow** at the **Laboratoire de Mécanique Paris-Saclay, École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay, Université Paris-Saclay, France**, where I worked under the supervision of **Prof. Ludovic Chamoin**. My postdoctoral research focused on **learning-based Model Predictive Control, neural networks, and Scientific Machine Learning**.
</p>
<!-- :::
::: {.about-body}
::: {.about-biography} -->

<!-- :::
::: {.about-section}

<div class="about-label"> </div>  -->

<!-- 


-->


::: {.about-section}

<div class="about-label"> </div>

## Academic Appointments

::: {.career-list}

::: {.career-row}

<div class="career-period">2026 — Present</div>

<div class="career-details">

### Assistant Professor

**Department of Mathematics**  
National Institute of Technology Warangal, India

</div>

:::


::: {.career-row}

<div class="career-period">2025 — 2026</div>

<div class="career-details">

### Postdoctoral Fellow

**Laboratoire de Mécanique Paris-Saclay**  
École Normale Supérieure Paris-Saclay, Université Paris-Saclay, France

Supervisor: **Prof. Ludovic Chamoin**

</div>

:::

## Education

::: {.career-list}

::: {.career-row}

<div class="career-period">2022 — 2025</div>

<div class="career-details">

### Ph.D. in Mathematics

**National Institute of Technology Puducherry**

Advisor: **Dr. V. Govindaraj**

*Dissertation: A Bidirectional Study of Scientific Machine Learning and Dynamical Systems under Uncertainty.*

</div>

:::


::: {.career-row}

<div class="career-period">2020 — 2022</div>

<div class="career-details">

### M.Sc. Statistics and Applied Mathematics

**Central University of Tamil Nadu**

CGPA: **9.50** · Advisor: **Dr. Narasimhulu Dunna**

*Dissertation: Study of Decay Parameter of Blast Waves of Nuclear Explosion using Lie Group Similarity Transformation and Machine Learning Techniques.*

</div>

:::


::: {.career-row}

<div class="career-period">2017 — 2020</div>

<div class="career-details">

### B.Sc. Mathematics

**Sadakathullah Appa College**

CGPA: **9.60** · Advisor: **Prof. Rasitha Begum**

*Dissertation: Application of Mathematics in Rocket and Space Technology.*

</div>

:::

:::

:::


::: {.about-bottom-grid}


::: {.about-section}

<div class="about-label"> </div>

## Selected Achievements

<div class="simple-record">
<span>2025</span>
<p><strong>TWAS Research and Training Fellowship</strong></p>
</div>

<div class="simple-record">
<span>2024</span>
<p><strong>UGC-NFOBC Senior Research Fellowship</strong></p>
</div>

<div class="simple-record">
<span>2021</span>
<p><strong>UGC-NFOBC Junior Research Fellowship</strong></p>
</div>

<div class="simple-record">
<span>2021</span>
<p><strong>CSIR-NET Qualified</strong></p>
</div>

<div class="simple-record">
<span>2021</span>
<p><strong>IIT-JAM Qualified</strong></p>
</div>

:::


::: {.about-section}

<div class="about-label"> </div>

## Professional Activities

### Editorial Activity

Guest Editor, *Fractals*  
Special Issue on Fractional-Order Dynamical Systems.

### Scientific Committee

Scientific Committee Member, Annual International Congress on Computer Science.

### Peer Review

Reviewer for international journals including *Nonlinear Dynamics*, *Physica Scripta*, *New Journal of Physics*, *Soft Computing*, *Mathematics*, *European Physical Journal Plus*, and *International Journal of Dynamics and Control*.

:::


:::

:::

:::
